text: Stepping into this space, I am immediately taken by a feeling of curiosity and engagement. The air hums with intention, as though every element—words on walls, patterns of color, the arrangement of technology—asks me to slow down and reflect. I sense a spirit of experimentation and thoughtful inquiry. The soft glow, the clear lettering, and the blend of human hopes and digital voices invite me to ponder the themes of research and development: progress, collaboration, and the ongoing process of understanding what it means to connect and co-exist with intelligence, whether artificial or human.
